title: Jennie's Full Grass Block
description: Identify grass blocks from below and enjoy a smoother environment at the same time.
body:
Tired of those 'smooth' Grass Block textures that only affect 5/6 sides of it? Wish you could tell grass apart from dirt from underneath? Look no further!

This may conflict with texture packs that change the grass (or other) blocks.
This is not a connected texture pack; blocks are full regardless of their surroundings.
